---
title: Projects
description: "Open-source tools I've built to deepen my understanding of ML systems — from a PyTorch-like framework built from scratch to a library for accelerating ML experimentation."
highlight-style: atom-one
listing:
  contents:
    - projects
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  page-size: 10
image-align: left
page-layout: full
css: assets/listing.css
---
